subject: Corphish, a crustacean Pokemon with large red claws and an aggressive posture, moving through shallow water
description: A red crablike creature dominates the foreground, rearing up with oversized claws spread wide in an aggressive display. Its shell is primarily red with darker purple-blue undersides on the claws, and its eyes convey a fierce, combative expression. Water splashes around its lower body and aquatic plants are visible in the murky background. The lighting is dim and moody, giving the scene an underwater-edge ambiance with cool greens and blues contrasting the creature's vivid red coloring.
foreground: Red crustacean with large claws rearing in shallow water, water splashing at its base
background: Murky aquatic vegetation, dark water, dim lighting
emotion: aggressive, combative stance with fierce expression
